tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.noTasks: No tasks yet. Create your first task!
tasks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

projects.title: Projects
projects.noProjects: No projects yet. Create your first project!
projects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? Tasks will be unlinked from this project.

errors.nameTooLong: Project name must be 50 characters or less

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.backupDesc: Export all your data to a JSON file
dataManagement.restoreDesc: Import data from a JSON file (Overwrites current data)
dataManagement.overwriteConfirm: This will overwrite all current data. Are you sure?

keyboard.pressToStart: Press <kbd class="bg-muted rounded px-2 py-1 font-mono text-xs">Ctrl+S</kbd> to start/stop the timer
keyboard.pressForShortcuts: Press <kbd class="bg-muted rounded px-2 py-1 font-mono text-xs">Ctrl+/</kbd> for all keyboard shortcuts

welcome.title: Welcome to TomatoTask!
welcome.subtitle: Your productivity companion using the Pomodoro Technique

step1.title: Work with focus
step1.desc: Set a timer for 25 minutes and focus on a single task without distractions

step2.title: Take short breaks
step2.desc: After each work session, take a 5-minute break to recharge

step3.title: Long break after 4 pomodoros
step3.desc: After 4 work sessions, reward yourself with a 15-minute break

step1.title: Create your tasks
step1.desc: Add tasks in the left sidebar. Estimate how many pomodoros each will take.

step2.title: Organize with projects
step2.desc: Group your tasks by projects for better organization and tracking

step3.title: Select a task and start
step3.desc: Click on a task to work on it, then start the timer

step4.title: Track your progress
step4.desc: Watch your completed pomodoros add up and celebrate your productivity!

shortcuts.title: Useful shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Ctrl+S to start/stop, Ctrl+N for new task, Ctrl+/ for all shortcuts

dragDrop.title: Drag & Drop
dragDrop.desc: Easily reorder your tasks and projects to prioritize what matters.

stats.title: Advanced Statistics
stats.desc: Visualize your productivity with yearly heatmaps and detailed charts.

backup.title: Data Backup
backup.desc: Export and import your data to keep it safe or move between devices.

notifications.title: Desktop Notifications
notifications.desc: Get notified when sessions end, even if the app is in the background.

notifications.workComplete: Work session complete! Time for a break.
notifications.breakComplete: Break is over! Ready to focus?

dialogs.deleteTaskConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.deleteProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? All tasks will remain but will no longer be associated with this project.
